reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified its status, sent a math question, and received the correct response "4" within seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface displaying three agents in sidebar.
Found agent "QA-20260421-191819-4d02" in sidebar - Agent was visible in the sidebar list with status indicator.
Clicked on agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully, showing the agent's chat interface.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status showed "idle" in the top-right corner (meets requirement).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into message input field - Message was entered into the input field without errors.
Clicked "Send message" button - Message was sent successfully and appeared in the chat as a user message bubble on the right.
Waited for agent response - Agent responded almost immediately (within 1 second) with the answer.

Verified response mentions "4" - Agent's response clearly displays "4" as the answer, with additional text "Worked for 1s" showing processing time. A new session "Quick Math Question Session" was automatically created.
